title: Create: Arcanum
description: A lightweight fabric based modpack that blends tech and magic mods together.
body:
Create Arcanum is a light modpack consisting of far more mods than I had originally planned, that work off of the Fabric API.

Collated by Lucian V. Ghost, the modpack is designed to balance magic and tech mods, as well as having a decent amount of exploration related mods for those players that like to adventure far away from their mages tower or factory laboratory.

 

The modpack is designed to be light enough that low grade systems can run it, while still being dense enough as to provide a decent amount of playable content.

 

The modpack contains but is not limited to:

Create & Addons

Hexcasting

Botania

Farmer's Delight, Cooking For Blockheads & Addons

Bewitchment & Addons

Fabric Waystones

Icarus & Things

& many more mods designed to give the player an enjoyable and varied expereience. Please Note this pack is still in development. All mods included in this pack belong to the respective mod authors.

Attribution Links:

Bewitchment: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bewitchment

Bewitchment Plus: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/bewitchment-plus

Bismerchment: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/besmirchment-2

Galosphere: https://modrinth.com/mod/galosphere
